phase: CO-5C: plugin test/config consumers migrated to Core test-fixtures; only fixture-uncovered discovery preference and project-intelligence materialization helpers remain as shrink-only exceptions
referenceLimitsNote: Limits are TRUE scanner counts (multi-line imports included), recalibrated 2026-06-21 after CO-5C migrated AST/discovery/analysis/project-intelligence test consumers to @alembic/core/test-fixtures where CO-5B exposed equivalent helpers. Remaining limits are shrink-only for infra DB fixture exceptions, one core/discovery preference-helper test residual, and one project-intelligence materialization-helper test residual not yet covered by test-fixtures.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.reason: No stable facade exports the drizzle singleton lifecycle (initDrizzle/getDrizzle/resetDrizzle). @alembic/core/database wires the singleton via DatabaseConnection.connect(), cannot open :memory: fixtures, and redirects excluded projects to a shared tmp DB, so it is not a semantics-preserving target for isolated test fixtures.
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.removalTrigger: Core ships a stable test/fixture facade (in-memory migrated DB + DrizzleDB without global singleton mutation); route via the IC/AD export-surface wave.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.reason: No stable facade exports the drizzle schema tables (auditLogs).
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/dr.removalTrigger: Core promotes schema table exports onto a stable facade, or an AuditStore DI wave removes the singleton fallback.

@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/mi.reason: Isolated :memory: fixtures need callable migration modules; openAlembicDatabase cannot target :memory: and mutates the global drizzle singleton. Hand-copied DDL (Alembic Train B shape) was rejected for the 40+ column knowledge_entries table after Alembic needed drift coordination (Alembic f5ff9e1) for a far smaller copy.
@alembic/core/infrastructure/database/mi.removalTrigger: Same stable test/fixture facade as the drizzle row.
Same stable test/fixture facade as the drizzle row.

consumers: test/unit/Phase2-PanoramaIntegration.test.ts discoverer preference helpers: detectConflict, loadPreference, savePreference
@alembic/core/core/discovery.reason: CO-5B @alembic/core/test-fixtures does not export discoverer preference helpers. The retired @alembic/core/project-intelligence aggregate is no longer package-exported, so this test keeps the narrow still-exported core/discovery route for the exact unsupported helpers only.
@alembic/core/core/discovery.removalTrigger: Core exposes detectConflict/loadPreference/savePreference through @alembic/core/test-fixtures or another stable fixture facade, or the preference-helper tests move into AlembicCore.

consumers: test/unit/ProjectAnalysisMaterialization.test.ts materialization/phase-runner helpers: buildEntityGraphInput, materializeCallGraph, resolveProjectAnalysisMaterialization, runPhase1_7_CallGraph, runPhase2_DependencyGraph
@alembic/core/project-intelligence.reason: CO-5B @alembic/core/test-fixtures covers AST analysis, discovery registry, language service, call graph analysis classes, language plugin fixtures, panorama classes, FileDiffSnapshotStore helpers, and evaluateProjectAnalysisIncrementalPlan; it does not export these materialization/phase-runner helpers. CO-5C leaves this exact residual import rather than inventing mocks or editing Core.
@alembic/core/project-intelligence.removalTrigger: Core exposes equivalent real helpers through @alembic/core/test-fixtures or another stable fixture facade, or these tests move into AlembicCore.
